proposal.summary: Run a focused playable-flow validation for Stage 1 before build work, checking scene roots, runtime systems, UI surfaces, required prefabs, data references, Build Settings, and Unity compiler/test readiness.

user_decisions.decision: Proceed through Harness steps automatically and treat the recurring next-step prompt as approval to continue approved-for-implementation units.

decision_log.reason: phases/index.json has no active or blocked phase and NEXT_ACTION.md recommends Stage1PlayableFlowValidation.

current_state: Completed. Stage1 playable-flow validation passed with followups: concrete tests are not yet authored and no BuildScript.BuildWindows entry point exists.
resume_instructions: This phase is complete. Next, start one new Harness unit for WindowsBuildScript only if phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.
